queries.name: Date Extraction with Scalar UDFs
queries.description: Extract the year, month, and day from a date using three scalar UDFs.

queries.name: Date Extraction with Table UDF
queries.description: Extract the year, month, and day from a date using a single table-returning UDF.

queries.name: Multi-language Scalar UDFs
queries.description: Extract the year, month, and day from a date using scalar UDFs implemented in different languages.

queries.name: Average and Median with Aggregate UDFs
queries.description: Compute the average and median author count per artifact using two aggregate UDFs.

queries.name: Aggregate Calculations with Table UDF
queries.description: Compute the average and median author count per artifact using a single table-returning UDF.

queries.name: File Format Conversion
queries.description: Convert and union two disk files (XML and JSON formats) into a single CSV file.

queries.name: JSON File Analysis
queries.description: Analyze a JSON file with publication metadata to compute the average citation and author counts.

queries.name: Publication Metadata Analysis
queries.description: Analyze publication metadata from two tables (author lists and citations) to compute the average citation and author counts.

queries.name: Author Pair Counting
queries.description: Clean author list data and count all possible author pairs for publications with fewer than 50 authors.

queries.name: Iterative k-Means Clustering
queries.description: Perform iterative k-means clustering on publications grouped by type, based on funding amounts accessed through funding projects.

queries.name: Recursive k-Means Clustering
queries.description: Perform recursive k-means clustering on publications grouped by type, based on funding amounts accessed through funding projects.

queries.name: Noisy Artifact Rankings
queries.description: Return the 10 most-viewed artifacts from the past year, adding Gaussian noise to the counts.

queries.name: JSON Link Extraction
queries.description: Extract links between publications and projects from an external JSON file.

queries.name: Recent Author Affiliations
queries.description: Return the most recent affiliation of the first author for publications funded by the European Commission.

queries.name: XML Link Extraction
queries.description: Extract links between publications and projects from an external XML file, excluding links that already exist in the database.

queries.name: Author Collaboration Analysis
queries.description: Analyze author collaborations within projects by computing:

queries.name: TF/IDF Computation
queries.description: Compute the term frequency-inverse document frequency (TF/IDF) for each term in artifact abstracts.

queries.name: Jaccard Similarity
queries.description: Compute Jaccard similarity between document abstracts from two external files and return the top 5 similar documents per source document.

queries.name: Project Artifact Linking
queries.description: Return the pivoted count of links to artifacts of different types for each project.

queries.name: Date Cleaning and Updating
queries.description: Update artifact table dates after cleaning.

queries.name: JSON Link Insertion
queries.description: Extract links between publications and projects from a JSON file and insert them into the `projects_artifacts` table.

udfs.name: Addnoise
udfs.description: Adds Gaussian noise to a value and returns a float

udfs.name: Clean
udfs.description: Performs a data cleaning task on the string tokens of a JSON list

udfs.name: Cleandate
udfs.description: Reads a date and converts it to a common format (if needed) and handles problem dates

udfs.name: Converttoeuro
udfs.description: Converts currency to euro, returns a float

udfs.name: Extractclass
udfs.description: Extracts class from a string with format `funder::class::projectid`

udfs.name: Extractcode
udfs.description: Extracts project ID from a structured string containing the funder's ID, funding class, and project ID

udfs.name: Extractday
udfs.description: Reads a date (as a string) and extracts an integer with the day

udfs.name: Extractfunder
udfs.description: Extracts funder from a string with format `funder::class::projectid`

udfs.name: Extractid
udfs.description: Extracts project ID from a string with format `funder::class::projectid`

udfs.name: Extractmonth
udfs.description: Reads a date (as a string) and extracts an integer with the month

udfs.name: Extractprojectid
udfs.description: Processes a text snippet and extracts a 6-digit project identifier

udfs.name: Extractyear
udfs.description: Reads a date (as a string) and extracts an integer with the year

udfs.name: Filterstopwords
udfs.description: Removes stopwords from the input text

udfs.name: Frequentterms
udfs.description: Returns a space-separated text containing the most N% frequent tokens

udfs.name: Jaccard
udfs.description: Processes two JSON lists with tokens and calculates the Jaccard distance

udfs.name: Jpack
udfs.description: Converts a string to a JSON list with tokens

udfs.name: Jsoncount
udfs.description: Returns the length of a JSON list

udfs.name: Jsort
udfs.description: Processes a JSON list and returns a sorted JSON list

udfs.name: Jsortvalues
udfs.description: Processes a JSON list, if a value contains more than one token it sorts the value tokens

udfs.name: Keywords
udfs.description: Removes punctuation from text and returns the keywords in one string

udfs.name: Log10
udfs.description: Computes and returns the logarithm

udfs.name: Lower
udfs.description: Converts the input text to lowercase

udfs.name: Removeshortterms
udfs.description: Processes a JSON list, if a value contains more than one token it removes tokens with length less than 3 chars

udfs.name: Stem
udfs.description: Stems the input text

udfs.name: Avg
udfs.description: Computes average

udfs.name: Count
udfs.description: Computes count

udfs.name: Max
udfs.description: Computes max

udfs.name: Median
udfs.description: Computes median

udfs.name: Extractfromdate
udfs.description: Reads a date (as string), returns 3 column values (day, month, year)

udfs.name: Jsonparse
udfs.description: Parses a JSON dict per time and returns a tuple with the values

udfs.name: Combinations
udfs.description: Reads a JSON list and returns a table with all the combinations per an integer parameter

udfs.name: Extractkeys
udfs.description: Selects keys from XML parsed input

udfs.name: Strsplitv
udfs.description: Processes a string at a time and returns its tokens in separate rows

udfs.name: Jgroupordered
udfs.description: Performs a group by with an aggregate defined as a (named) parameter on a subquery ordered by an attribute

udfs.name: Kmeans
udfs.description: Iterative version of the kmeans function

udfs.name: Kmeans
udfs.description: Clusters input data using recursive kmeans, returns cluster id and data point

udfs.name: Xmlparse
udfs.description: Parses XML input and returns a table

udfs.name: Pivot
udfs.description: Converts rows of a specific attribute (optionally grouped by another attribute) into columns, while applying an aggregation within the transformed dataset, and returns one tuple per input group

udfs.name: Top
udfs.description: Processes one group at a time and returns the top N values of an attribute

udfs.name: File
udfs.description: Parses an external file (CSV, XML, JSON) and returns a table

udfs.name: Output
udfs.description: Exports the results of a subquery to local storage in various formats and returns true if it succeeds

udfs.name: getstats
udfs.description: Inputs a table with integer values and returns the avg and the median for each input column
